zh.of Seagry, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾澤亞格利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence Drew於大約1355年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Drew27歲，母親Joan Maufitz24歲。他於大約1379年5月與Lucy Restwold在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年2月7日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.of Seagry, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾澤亞格利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lawrence Drew于大约1355年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Drew27岁，母亲Joan Maufitz24岁。他于大约1379年5月与Lucy Restwold在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年2月7日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: Anglo-Norman: Druerie, courtship, gallantry, love

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Drew was born about 1355, in England, his father, Thomas Drew, was 27 and his mother, Joan Maufitz, was 24. He married Lucy Restwold about May 1379, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 7 February 1417, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Drew est né environ 1355, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Drew, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Maufitz, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Restwold environ mai 1379, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 7 février 1417, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence Drew um 1355 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Drew 27 und seine Mutter Joan Maufitz 24. Er hat um Mai 1379 in England Lucy Restwold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 7. Februar 1417 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Drew è nato il circa 1355 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Drew, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Maufitz, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Restwold circa maggio 1379, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 7 febbraio 1417, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイア
ja.of Seagry, Wiltshire, England: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアセアグリー
ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Drewが約1355年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Drewは27歳，母Joan Maufitzは24歳であった。約1379年5月にイギリスでLucy Restwoldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年2月7日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Drew(이)가 대략 1355년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Drew(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Maufitz(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 5월 영국에서 Lucy Restwold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 2월 7일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Drew nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Drew, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Maufitz, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Restwold aproximadamente maio de 1379, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 7 de fevereiro de 1417, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence Drew родился около 1355 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Drew было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Maufitz, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Restwold около май 1379 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 7 февраль 1417 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lawrence Drew nació aproximadamente 1355, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Drew, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Maufitz, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lucy Restwold aproximadamente mayo de 1379, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 7 de febrero de 1417, en su pueblo.
